dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Hey Sam! I walk to school every day, and I love the fresh air in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Me too! It's so much better than the bus. Look, what's that?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Where? Oh, there's a dog near the park. It looks lost.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Poor thing. It doesn't have a collar. Should we help it?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes, we should. Come here, boy! He's friendly.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: He's so cute! But what can we do? We have school in twenty minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I don't know. Maybe we can find the owner. A guy on the street might know something.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Good idea. Let's ask that man over there.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Excuse me, sir. Do you know this dog?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: We found him here in the park. He seems lost.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: The man says no. This is difficult. What should we do now?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Wait, I have an idea. My phone! We can take a picture and post it.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's perfect! But we can't wait here all day.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: True. Maybe we can take him to school? Can you imagine it? A dog in class!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's not reasonable. The teachers will be angry. We ought to call someone.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: You're right. I'll call my mum. She works from home today. She can help.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Great! Does she like dogs?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: She loves animals. She'll definitely help us.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: My mum says she can meet us here in ten minutes. She'll take the dog home.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect! We should give him some water. He looks thirsty.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Good idea. I have a bottle in my bag. Here, boy!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: He's drinking! Poor guy. I hope we find his owner.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Me too. Oh, look! There's my mum's car.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Your mum is so nice to do this. I'd love to help find the owner too.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Absolutely! We can check after school. Maybe someone will call about the picture.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I really hope so. Come on, we should run now, or we'll be late!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: You're right. Bye, little dog! Good luck!
